'''Al T. Nadder''' was a [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] business owner in the resort city of [[Le Yer]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He ran a [[Al T. Nadder's Repair Shop|simple repair shop]], but was known for being quite talented at what he did.

{{Char-stub}}
